title: Add Ready condition and ServerList status field to Memcached CR
description:
**Size:** 🔧 small
**Category:** backend
**Priority:** critical
**Source:** GitHub Issue [#3](https://github.com/C5C3/memcached-operator/issues/3)

Add a `Ready` condition type to `computeConditions()` in `internal/controller/status.go` with reasons `MemcachedReady`/`MemcachedNotReady` — true only when `readyReplicas == desiredReplicas && desiredReplicas > 0`. Add `ServerList []string` field to `MemcachedStatus` in both `api/v1beta1/memcached_types.go` and `api/v1alpha1/memcached_types.go`, wired through `memcached_conversion.go`. Compute `serverList` as `["<cr-name>.<namespace>:<port>"]` (service DNS) in `reconcileStatus()` when Ready=True, nil otherwise. Regenerate CRD manifests via `make manifests`. Extend `TestComputeConditions` table in `status_test.go` with Ready assertions across all scenarios. Add integration tests in `memcached_status_reconcile_test.go` for Ready condition and serverList population. Add ServerList to conversion round-trip coverage in `memcached_conversion_test.go`. Update `docs/reference/crd-reference.md` with new status fields.

**Rationale:** The forge repo's Chainsaw E2E tests assert `status.conditions[?type=='Ready'].status == 'True'` on Memcached CRs, matching the contract established by MariaDB and ClusterIssuer CRs. Without a Ready condition, these tests timeout after 5 minutes and fail CI (https://github.com/C5C3/forge/actions/runs/23404038405). The `SimulateMemcachedReady` simulator in forge confirms the expected contract: Ready condition + readyReplicas + serverList. This blocks all forge infrastructure E2E test suites.

**Affected Areas:**
- api/v1beta1/memcached_types.go
- api/v1alpha1/memcached_types.go
- api/v1alpha1/memcached_conversion.go
- api/v1alpha1/memcached_conversion_test.go
- internal/controller/status.go
- internal/controller/status_test.go
- internal/controller/memcached_status_reconcile_test.go
- config/crd/bases/memcached.c5c3.io_memcacheds.yaml
- docs/reference/crd-reference.md
elaboration:
**Size:** 🔧 small
**Category:** backend
**Priority:** critical

## Summary

The memcached-operator controller sets `Available`, `Progressing`, and `Degraded` status conditions but lacks a `Ready` condition. The forge repo's Chainsaw E2E tests and `SimulateMemcachedReady` simulator expect a `Ready` condition on the Memcached CR, causing CI timeouts. This feature adds a `Ready` condition (true when all replicas are ready), a `ServerList` status field with a single service DNS entry, and the corresponding v1alpha1 conversion — matching the contract expected by downstream consumers.

## Scope

**Included:**
- Add `Ready` condition type to `computeConditions()` in `internal/controller/status.go` with reasons `MemcachedReady` / `MemcachedNotReady`
- `Ready` = `True` only when `readyReplicas == desiredReplicas` AND `desiredReplicas > 0`; `False` otherwise (distinct from `Available` which is true when `readyReplicas > 0`)
- Add `ServerList []string` field to `MemcachedStatus` in `api/v1beta1/memcached_types.go`
- Add matching `ServerList []string` field to `api/v1alpha1/memcached_types.go` and wire through `memcached_conversion.go`
- Compute `serverList` as a single service DNS entry: `["<cr-name>.<namespace>:<port>"]` (the headless Service's DNS name) — populated only when `Ready=True`
- Populate `serverList` in `reconcileStatus()` and persist via status subresource update
- Regenerate CRD manifests via `make manifests`
- Add unit tests for `Ready` condition in `internal/controller/status_test.go` (extend `TestComputeConditions` table across all existing scenarios)
- Add integration tests for `Ready` condition and `serverList` in `internal/controller/memcached_status_reconcile_test.go`
- Add conversion round-trip coverage for `ServerList` in `api/v1alpha1/memcached_conversion_test.go`
- Update `docs/reference/crd-reference.md` with new status fields

**Excluded:**
- Changing existing `Available`/`Progressing`/`Degraded` condition semantics (backward compatible, no regressions)
- Adding health-check endpoints or liveness condition types (not requested, YAGNI)
- Modifying the forge repo's tests or simulators (different repository)
- Adding custom printer columns for `Ready` condition (`readyReplicas` column already exists)
- Switching from Deployment to StatefulSet (orthogonal concern, major change)
- Generating ordinal-style pod DNS entries for serverList (operator uses Deployments, not StatefulSets — service DNS is the correct resolvable address)

## Visualization

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    R["reconcileStatus()"] --> FD["Fetch owned Deployment"]
    FD --> CC["computeConditions()"]
    CC --> CA["Set Available condition"]
    CC --> CP["Set Progressing condition"]
    CC --> CD["Set Degraded condition"]
    CC --> CR["Set Ready condition NEW"]
    R --> SL["Compute serverList NEW"]
    SL --> DNS["service DNS: cr-name.namespace:port"]
    CR --> SU["r.Status#40;#41;.Update#40;#41;"]
    CA --> SU
    CP --> SU
    CD --> SU
    DNS --> SU
```

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> NotReady: CR created
    NotReady --> NotReady: readyReplicas < desiredReplicas
    NotReady --> IsReady: readyReplicas == desiredReplicas AND desiredReplicas > 0
    IsReady --> NotReady: replica failure or scaling
    IsReady --> IsReady: stable

    note right of NotReady: Ready=False reason=MemcachedNotReady
    note right of IsReady: Ready=True reason=MemcachedReady
```

## Key Components

- **`api/v1beta1/memcached_types.go`**: Add `ServerList []string` field to `MemcachedStatus` with `json:"serverList,omitempty"`
- **`api/v1alpha1/memcached_types.go`**: Add matching `ServerList []string` field to v1alpha1 `MemcachedStatus`
- **`api/v1alpha1/memcached_conversion.go`**: Wire `ServerList` through `ConvertTo()` and `ConvertFrom()` (status section)
- **`api/v1alpha1/memcached_conversion_test.go`**: Add `ServerList` to `fullyPopulated()` helper for round-trip coverage
- **`internal/controller/status.go`**: Add `Ready` condition logic to `computeConditions()` (true when `readyReplicas == desiredReplicas && desiredReplicas > 0`); compute `serverList` as `["<name>.<namespace>:<port>"]` in `reconcileStatus()` when Ready
- **`internal/controller/status_test.go`**: Extend `TestComputeConditions` table with `Ready` condition assertions across all 8 existing scenarios plus HPA and missing-secret scenarios
- **`internal/controller/memcached_status_reconcile_test.go`**: Integration tests for `Ready` condition and `serverList` population via envtest
- **`config/crd/bases/memcached.c5c3.io_memcacheds.yaml`**: Regenerated via `make manifests` to include `serverList` schema
- **`docs/reference/crd-reference.md`**: Document `Ready` condition semantics and `serverList` field
